nodes.label: OpenAI Boilerplate File Storage Go-Live Gate
nodes.norm_label: openai boilerplate file storage go-live gate

nodes.label: Billing Address & Country Payment Routing Design
nodes.norm_label: billing address & country payment routing design

nodes.label: Ameriabank vPOS 3.0
nodes.rationale: Redirect-based gateway with no webhooks: InitPayment returns a PaymentID, browser redirects to a hosted page then back to BackURL; callback query params are never trusted, outcome is decided only from a server-side GetPaymentDetails call. Chosen to replace Stripe for all four currencies (AMD/USD/EUR/RUB).

nodes.label: lib/payments Module
nodes.rationale: Provider abstraction: pure ameria-core.ts (unit-tested outside Next, no server-only/env imports), server ameria.ts, provider-agnostic fulfillment.ts, and DB-driven router.ts. Amounts stored as cents, converted to major units only at the provider boundary.

nodes.label: DB-Driven Per-Currency Payment Routing
nodes.rationale: getPaymentRoute reads currencies.payment_route; anything other than 'ameria' (including legacy 'stripe') falls back to 'bank_manual'. Makes the admin currencies page the real routing control and enables staged per-currency rollout.

nodes.label: Credit-Grant Atomicity Follow-Up
nodes.rationale: adjustCredits upserts balance before inserting the ledger row; a mid-op failure plus settlement retry can double-increment. Must move to a single atomic RPC (or ledger-first) AND add a partial unique index on credit_ledger(reference_type, reference_id) where reference_type='payment_transaction' — both must land together.

nodes.label: resolvePaymentRoute (Billing-Country Routing)
nodes.rationale: Pure function: billing country AM (any casing) -> 'ameria', everything else (incl. unknown/blank/null) -> 'polar'. Changes the routing key from currency to billing country and supersedes getPaymentRoute at the two purchase call sites.

nodes.label: Polar (Merchant of Record)
nodes.rationale: International payment route, greenfield and deferred. Charges always in USD. POLAR_ENABLED flag defaults false; while off, non-Armenia billing shows a 'temporarily unavailable' notice and a server guard refuses to create any order/transaction. No SDK, session, or webhook ships in the skeleton.

nodes.label: OpenAI File Storage (openai_file_id)
nodes.rationale: Upload each boilerplate reference image to OpenAI File Storage once on admin create/edit and reference it by file_id at generation, instead of re-sending bytes every request. openai_file_id is NOT NULL, admin save fails outright if upload fails, deletes are best-effort. No backfill: migration wipes existing rows.

nodes.label: OpenAI Responses API image_generation Tool
nodes.rationale: Generation migrates from the Images API (ai SDK) to the official openai package's Responses API image_generation tool, which can consume file ids for the boilerplate and inline base64 for user photos. This SDK's ImageGenerationCall has no revised_prompt field, so revisedPrompt is always null.

nodes.label: Shared Personalization Boilerplate Library
nodes.rationale: Boilerplates stop belonging to one personalization_model and become a shared, reusable library attached many-to-many to catalog items via catalog_item_boilerplates. Credit cost = number of selected boilerplates (min 1); one OpenAI generation call per selected boilerplate.

nodes.label: Personalization Tag System (personal_color/text/photo)
nodes.rationale: catalog_items.tags text[] constrained to personal_color/personal_text/personal_photo controls which input widgets appear on the customer personalize page. System Prompt + boilerplate instruction + tag-driven inputs compose the AI prompt, replacing the hardcoded night-light prompt.

nodes.label: Item Form AI Autogenerate
nodes.rationale: Per-field Autogenerate and a Fill-all button draft 20 free-text item fields (title, notes, characteristics, prompts, and localized SEO for en/ru/am) from the admin's English Description, via the raw openai package Responses API with Structured Outputs. Fully replaces the old two-step SEO AI draft flow; nothing persists until the item form saves.

nodes.label: MCP Catalog Item Connector (OAuth 2.1)
nodes.rationale: Remote MCP server exposing 5 catalog-item tools, secured by a hand-rolled OAuth 2.1 authorization server that reuses the admin's Supabase login and catalog_manage permission. MCP-created items are always draft; both ChatGPT and Claude require OAuth 2.1 for write tools, so one server serves both. Three new Postgres tables back client registration, auth codes, and tokens.

nodes.label: Boilerplate Percentage Price Adjustment
nodes.rationale: New price_adjustment_percent integer column on personalization_boilerplates; adjustedPriceCents(baseCents, pct) = max(0, round(baseCents * (1 + pct/100))) is the single source of truth. Any sign allowed (surcharge or discount), null = no adjustment, floored at 0.

nodes.label: Per-Item Laser Engraving Styles (Removed)
nodes.rationale: Bespoke per-item laser engraving (four catalog_items columns + engraving-fields UI + separate prompt channel from commit 20c610a5) duplicated the boilerplate system. Reverted; Contour and Solid become ordinary boilerplates plus the percentage price adjustment.
